characters.name: Abeline Walker
characters.description: Abeline WalkerNameAbeline WalkerBirthday1961Age58StatusAliveNickname(s)Abby-bear(byHoyt)GenderFemaleFamilyBonham Walker(husband)Cordell Walker(son)Liam Walker(son)Stella Walker(granddaughter)August Walker(grandson)Emily Walker(daughter-in-law)Willie(Brother)FriendsHoyt RawlinsGeri BroussardLarry JamesTrey BarnettCassie PerezRomancesBonham Walker(husband)Gary(former affair)Behind the scenesAppears inWalkerActorMolly HaganSeasons1First1.01PilotAbeline Walkeris one of the main characters onThe CWcrime drama series,Walker. She is the mother ofCordellandLiam Walker. The CW's official character description: "an unstoppable force of nature. Abeline is a third-generation Texas rancher. Smart and perceptive, she always puts the family first and never hesitates to give advice whether asked for or not."[1] Abeline marriedBonham Walkerand they had two children together,CordellandLiam Walker. When their children moved out to live their respective lives, Abeline and Bonham had a quaint life together on theirranch. She became a doting Grandmother to Cordell's childrenStellaandAugust. When Cordell's wifeEmilyis murdered and Cordell takes an undercover assignment, Stella and August moved in with their Grandparents. Abeline tried her best to comfort the grieving children and work to get them the best education possible, including enrolling them in Sacred Heart high school, a Catholic school, and trying to get August to open up while keeping Stella out of trouble The CW's official character description: "an unstoppable force of nature. Abeline is a third-generation Texas rancher. Smart and perceptive, she always puts the family first and never hesitates to give advice whether asked for or not."[1]
characters.personality_section: The CW's official character description: "an unstoppable force of nature. Abeline is a third-generation Texas rancher. Smart and perceptive, she always puts the family first and never hesitates to give advice whether asked for or not."[1]

characters.name: Adriana Ramirez
characters.description: Adriana RamirezNameAdriana RamirezAge50sStatusAliceOccupationPsychiatristAuthorGenderFemaleFamilyMicki Ramirez(Adoptive Daughter: estranged)Mercedes Ruiz(Sister: estranged)Behind the scenesAppears inWalkerActorAlex MenesesSeasons1FirstBar NoneAdriana Ramirezis a guest character onThe CWreboot crime drama series,Walker. The CW's official character description: "a successful psychiatrist and published author and mother ofMicki Ramirez,Cordell Walker’s new partner in theTexas Rangers. She is a strong personality who’s manipulative and very invasive when it comes to her daughter Micki’s life." Adriana is the sister of Mercedes Ruiz, who unable to care for her daughter Nina Ruiz, and left the child in the care of Adriana. Mercedes then checked into rehab for a stint that was supposed to last three-months. Three years later, Nina had grown up believing Adriana to be her biological mother, so when Mercedes returned, Adriana asked her sister to let her be Nina's mother. Mercedes refused unless Adriana paid her, so she did. Adriana moved to Texas with Nina and legally changed their surnames. She also changed Nina's name to Michelle "Micki" Ramirez. When Micki inquired about the origin of her nickname, she was told that Adriana thought she would have a son. The CW's official character description: "a successful psychiatrist and published author and mother ofMicki Ramirez,Cordell Walker’s new partner in theTexas Rangers. She is a strong personality who’s manipulative and very invasive when it comes to her daughter Micki’s life."
characters.personality_section: The CW's official character description: "a successful psychiatrist and published author and mother ofMicki Ramirez,Cordell Walker’s new partner in theTexas Rangers. She is a strong personality who’s manipulative and very invasive when it comes to her daughter Micki’s life."

characters.name: Alma Muñoz
characters.description: Alma MuñozNameAlma MuñozAge40sStatusAliveOccupationFlower shop ownerGenderFemaleFamilyIsabel Muñoz(daughter)RomancesLorenzo Muñoz(husband)Behind the scenesAppears inWalkerActorKarina DominguezSeasons1First1.01PilotAlma Muñozis a recurring character on theThe CWcrime drama series,Walker. She is portrayed by Karina Dominguez. InPilot, Lorenzo and his wife Alma arrive at the Austin Police Department to pick up their daughter,Isabel, who was arrested for possession of marijuana. When they arrive they are spooked to meet Texas RangerCordell Walker, though he explains he is the father of Isabel's friend and co-arresteeStella Walker. While the Walker's are allowed to leave, the Muñoz's are asked to stay due to their pending immigration status. The next dayWalker meets with Mrs. Munoz in the hopes she’s seen Stella, but she hasn’t and neither has Bel. The woman is flustered as she thought Walker was here for her husband and herself, as they don’t have their papers yet. Bel didn’t know as she was born here. Walker understands and promises to do what he can to help.

characters.name: August Walker
characters.description: August WalkerNameAugust Edward WalkerAge17/18StatusAliveNickname(s)AuggieOccupationSHH Student(Graduate)GenderMaleFamilyCordell Walker(father)Emily Walker(mother)Stella Walker(older sister)Abeline Walker(grandmother)Bonham Walker(grandfather)Liam Walker(uncle)FriendsRubyColton DavidsonToddScooterBrodyBehind the scenesAppears inWalkerActorKale CulleySeasons1, 2, 3, 4First1.01PilotLastSee You Sometime August Walkeris one of the main characters onThe CWcrime drama series,Walker. He is Fourteen years old, sweet, sincere, and quietly smart, August is Walker’s son. He rabidly consumes information and is eager to learn any skill that will help, please, and impress his family. Unlike his sister, he doesn’t want to cause a stir. In other words, a time bomb.

characters.name: Augustus
characters.description: AugustusStatusAliveOccupationDeputy of IndependenceTitlesDeputyGenderMaleFriendsCalianBehind the scenesAppears inWalker: IndependenceActorPhilemon ChambersSeasons1First1.01PilotAugustusis a main character onThe CWwestern drama seriesWalker: Independence. The CW's official character description: A striking Black man with a warm smile and eyes filled with a world of experience, Gus is the deputy in Independence. Gus gives every impression of being the trusted face of law and order in town, while keeping his tragic past and personal issues to himself. Methodical, patient and willing to do whatever it takes to keep Independence safe, Gus begins to suspect the man he calls sheriff while questioning the town he's given so much to protect. The CW's official character description:
characters.personality_section: The CW's official character description:

characters.name: Bonham Walker
characters.description: Bonham WalkerNameBonham WalkerBirthday1952Age67StatusAliveGenderMaleFamilyAbeline Walker(wife)Cordell Walker(son)Liam Walker(son)Stella Walker(granddaughter)August Walker(grandson)Emily Walker(daughter-in-law)FriendsGeri BroussardHoyt RawlinsLarry JamesTrey BarnettCassie PerezRomancesAbeline Walker(wife)Behind the scenesAppears inWalkerActorMitch PileggiFirst1.01Pilot Bonham Walkeris one of the main characters onThe CWcrime drama series,Walker. He is the rancher father ofCordellandLiam Walker. He is portrayed byMitch Pileggi. The CW's official character description: "He is sturdy, conservative and tough as nails but a family man through and through. A third-generation Texas rancher, he’s most comfortable taking care of business on the ranch — in the bullpen, supervising cowboys, training horses. Bonham is a man who speaks his mind. He’s not about to mince words when it comes to talking to his kids."[1] The CW's official character description: "He is sturdy, conservative and tough as nails but a family man through and through. A third-generation Texas rancher, he’s most comfortable taking care of business on the ranch — in the bullpen, supervising cowboys, training horses. Bonham is a man who speaks his mind. He’s not about to mince words when it comes to talking to his kids."[1]

The CW's official character description: "Liam’s fiancé. Bret is genuinely in love with Liam – but he thinks Manhattan is the place to be, and that he and Liam should lead a swellegant life where the only horses are in Central Park." Coming Soon. characters.name: C.D. Parker
characters.description: C.D. ParkerOccupationOwner ofC.D.'s Bar & GrillGenderMaleBehind the scenesAppears inWalker, Texas Ranger C.D.was a retired Ranger and a bar owner at "C.D.'s Bar & Grill". He's a good friend of the Rangers, and also ofTrent MalloyandCarlos Sandoval. CD is always able to put a smile on their faces...especiallyJames Trivette. CD loves to pull Trivette's leg; Trivette, in turn, loves to tease CD about his chili. Jimmy's nickname for C.D. is "Big Dog". Little is known about CD's past. Prior to becoming a Texas Ranger, he served in the U.S. Army during the Korean War.

characters.name: Alexandra Cahill Walker
characters.description: Alexandra Cahill WalkerOccupationDistrict AttorneyGenderFemaleRomancesCordell WalkerBehind the scenesAppears inWalker, Texas RangerActorSheree J. WilsonAlexandra Cahill-Walkeris a district attorney working in Dallas, Texas. Alex works closely withTexas RangersCordell WalkerandJames Trivette. She is also known to chill atC.D. Parker's bar. She was portrayed bySheree J. Wilson, who also co-starred in Chuck Norris's 1994 movieHellbound. She was born in October of 1965.

characters.name: Calian
characters.description: CalianNameCalianStatusAliveOccupationScouting party memberBehind the scenesAppears inWalker: IndependenceActorJustin Johnson CortezSeasons1Calianis a main character onThe CWwestern crime drama series,Walker: Independence. The CW's official character description: A member of an Indigenous scouting party outside Independence, Calian speaks fluent English, and has mixed feelings about the influx of the white settlers out West. Calian is curious to their innovations, their music, their culture but remains wary about losing his tribal lands. After spotting Abby half-dead in the brush, Calian saves her and takes her to the outskirts of Independence — he knows better than to walk into town, escorting a white woman. The CW's official character description:
characters.personality_section: The CW's official character description:

characters.name: Carlos Mendoza
characters.description: Carlos MendozaNameCarlos MendozaAge50sStatusAliveOccupationInmateGenderMaleFamilyNieceBehind the scenesAppears inWalkerActorJoe PerezSeasons1FirstBar NoneCarlos Mendozais a minor character onThe CWreboot crime drama series,Walker. Carlos is the the convicted murderer ofEmily Walker, having confessed to the crime after his arrest. He was interrogated by Emily's widow Cordell, who believed that Carlos was telling the truth about the murder. He was than placed into a corrections facility to serve his life sentence. He was diagnosed with MS prior to his arrest, but passed off the track marks on his arm for drug use, instead of admitting his medical condition. His niece owns an art gallery in New Mexico, whichLiam WalkerandLarry Jameslearn has been getting large purchases over the last year from the same LLP. Coming Soon.

characters.name: Carlos Mendoza

characters.name: Carlos Sandoval
characters.description: Carlos SandovalGenderMaleFriendsTrent MalloyBehind the scenesAppears inWalker, Texas RangerActorMarco SanchezCarlos Sandovalis a former police detective turned Private Investigator. He is a childhood chum and best friend ofTrent Malloy. They both met when they were kids at a community center and instantly clicked. Carlos had a big brother named Hector Sandoval who got killed by a street drug dealer named El 'Vaquero when Carlos was only 12 years old. Carlos also has a younger sister named Theresa (Sandoval) Estrella who is divorced and has 1 daughter Carmen Lopez and 1 son Jesse Estrella. Carlos helped his nephew-in-law Hector Lopez whom Carmen got married to when Carmen and Hector were both 19 years old which really angered Carlos to accept their marriage. Carlos Sandoval is a rookie police officer in the Dallas Police Department and later got promoted to detective after helping Walker saving Trent's life from falling down to his death with Rod Barkley, a former Metro PD officer. Carlos is the same like Trivette always ending up in trouble with Trent. Carlos always loved to date younger women in their early 20s but Trent only loves "grown" women.

She is "an impulsive, no-nonsense Ranger and partner to Texas RangerCordell Walker."[1]Cassie was introduced inseason 2. Ranger (before promotion)

characters.name: Cassie Perez

characters.name: Charlie Brooks
characters.description: Charlie BrooksOccupationMob accountant, witnessGenderMaleBehind the scenesAppears inWalker, Texas RangerActorTerry KiserCharlie Brooksis a mob accountant-turned-witness whomCordell Walkerwas assigned to transport by air, so that Charlie might give testimony against his former boss at a trial. There was no lack of effort by Charlie's ex-boss to kill both him and Walker en route...all in vain, of course (Mayday). Following said trial, the work-release program at Charlie's prison found him taking various jobs (all under Walker's supervision); these included being a summer camp-counselor (Last Hope). Later, Walker recruited Charlie to impersonate a supposedly-in-custody assassin/demolitions-expert...for whom Brooks just happened to be a dead ringer (Iceman).

characters.name: Charlotte MacKenzie
characters.description: Charlotte MacKenzieNameCharlotte MacKenzieStatusAliveNickname(s)Charlotte MacKenzieGenderFemaleFamilyFamily from Boston(father)Abigail Walker(sister)Unborn Child(niece or nephew)Walker Family(descendants though Abigail Walker)RomancesKate Carver( one night stand)Behind the scenesAppears inWalker: IndependenceActorStella BakerSeasons1Charlotte "Charlie" MacKenzie, is a guest character on The CW western drama series, Walker: Independence. OnceAbby's family received news of Liam's death, Abby's sister Charlotte, aka Charlie, left Boston for Texas in search of her missing sister Mary Collins. Abby changed her name upon starting her new life in Texas, so when Charlie arrived in Independence and asked the Sheriff about her sister, the missing woman named Mary. Gus, who has known Abby's real identity since she arrived in town and kept her secret without being asked to, was able to intercept Abby, and he arranged for them to meet privately in Abby and Kate's room at the Inn.

characters.name: Clint West
characters.description: Clint WestNameClint WestBirthdayMarch 11, 1985Age35StatusDeceasedCause of DeathShot in the chestOccupationInmate(Escaped)GenderMaleFamilyTrevor Strand(Son)Harriet(Sister-in-Law)FriendsTwyla JeanJaxon DavisDuke CulpepperRomancesCrystal West(Wife)Behind the scenesAppears inWalkerActorAustin NicholsSeasons1FirstDuke(Flashback)LastDefend The RanchTotal6Clint Westwas a guest character onThe CWreboot crime drama series,Walker. Clint was the former ring leader of theRodeo Kingsoperation and a convicted felon. Clint was either 19 or 20 years old when he had a son withCrystal,Trevorwho was not part of his criminal days as they left him with Crystal's sister Harriet who provided them updates on him. Clint later married Crystal and they became a wild and dangerous couple. Their exciting life together included joining a traveling rodeo, which they used to cover their bank robberies. Clint was arrested on March 5, 2016, for resisting arrest, DWI, possession of illegal weapons, assault, and misdemeanor drug charges. When he was released, he and Crystal enlisted Jaxon Davis andTwyla Jeaninto their robbery crew, becoming known throughout Texas as theRodeo Kings. Their robberies often resulted in bank employees being critically injured and even killed. Clint's wild mentality and dangerous disregard for anyone other than himself often resulted in their robberies turning violent. When Jaxon broke his leg, the crew was short a member and eventually initiated newcomerDuke Culpepperinto their crew.

characters.name: Connie Richards
characters.description: Connie RichardsNameConnie RichardsAge40sStatusAliveOccupationReceptionist atTexas DOPSGenderFemaleFriendsCordell WalkerBehind the scenesAppears inWalkerActorMandy McMillianSeasons1FirstBack in The SaddleConnie Richardsis a minor guest character onThe CWreboot crime drama series,Walker. InBack in The Saddle, Connie tells Rangers Ramirez and Walker that Hutchinson is out of the country. She delivers the message in a mock-tone of Hutchinson's voice, sparking Walker to remind her that she doesn't have to come all the way out of her office to tell them. She can just call them about messages, but she retorts that she's practicing for an audition. InDon't Fence Me In, Ramirez and Walker receive an urgent radio call from Connie, who is working late at thestation. She directs them to the Harlan Oil Field where the Sheriff needs backup. She explains that Sheriff Shaw received a distress call from the owner of the field, Bob Harlan, but when he arrived Bob was DOA with the shooter fleeing the scene. Connie describes the shooter as a Hispanic male in a yellow truck. A few days later, Cordell asks Connie to access the plant cam at the Harlan botanical gardens, which she does with ease due to her hacking abilities. Her ability to hack is surprising to Micki. Connie later patchesCaptain Jamesthrough to Walker's radio frequency so he can hear them apprehendingMonty Shaw. Connie is a light-hearted woman with a sharp wit and intellect that is often hidden behind by her excited nature.
characters.personality_section: Connie is a light-hearted woman with a sharp wit and intellect that is often hidden behind by her excited nature.

characters.name: Cordell Walker (1993)
characters.description: Cordell WalkerStatusAliveNickname(s)The RangerOccupationTexas RangerGenderMaleFamilySeeFamily sectionRomancesEllen Garrett (deceased)Alexandra CahillBehind the scenesAppears inWalker, Texas RangerActorChuck NorrisSeasonsSeason 1Season 2Season 3Season 4Season 5Season 6Season 7Season 8Season 9FirstOne Riot, One RangerLastThe Final ShowdownTotal193Cordell Walkeris a Dallas-Fort Worth-based (Company B) member of the Texas Department of Safety'sTexas Ranger Division, where he worked closely with partnersC.D. ParkerandJames Trivette. Cordell Walker was born in November of 1953 as the only child of John (Cherokee Native) and Elizabeth Firewalker (White/Caucasian). Walker's parents were killed by white supremacists when he was a little boy (he was a witness to their murders at a summer carnival) and Walker was then raised by his paternal uncle, a Native American namedRay Firewalker. In the mid-1960s, Walker joined the U.S. Marine Corps and served in Vietnam. During his time in the Marines, Walker was stationed in Japan, where he befriended a local family whose patriarch (Mr. Sakai) taught Cordell the martial arts. After his hitch in the service ended, Walker continued to practice martial arts, which led him to competing in kickboxing tournaments, culminating into him becoming a kickboxing champion. Walker adheres very strongly to the principles of law and order, as well as personal honor and integrity. He maintains immense self- discipline, especially in terms of the use of force. In spite of his martial arts mastery, he only uses physical violence either in self- defense or to protect those who cannot protect themselves. Walker cares deeply about helping those in need, both in his position as a police officer and off- duty as he works with various charities and community- outreach efforts. He is also a devout Christian, who shows more evidence of his faith in the show's later seasons. Walker shows greater cognitive ability than the norm. Given any mystery, he can arrive at any conclusions with a fraction of the data in a case in a matter of days. Walker is extremely loyal to his friends and loved ones, doing whatever he can to help them when they are in any kind of peril.

characters.name: Cordell Walker (2021)
characters.description: Cordell WalkerNameCordell Beauregard Walker[1]Birthday1982Age37StatusAliveNickname(s)Duke Culpepper(undercover alias)Trouble(byTrey)Cordi(byLiamandHoyt)Mr. Conflict of Interest, Beau(byMicki)Sassy Boots(byHoyt)OccupationTexas RangerUS Marine(retired)GenderMaleFamilyAbeline Walker(mother)Bonham Walker(father)Liam Walker(brother)Emily Walker†(late wife)Stella Walker(daughter)August Walker(son)FriendsLarry JamesGeri BroussardMicki Ramirez(former partner)Hoyt Rawlins†Trey BarnettCassie Perez(former partner)Kelly JamesRomancesEmily Walker†(late wife)Twyla Jean(undercover fling; briefly rekindled)Geri Broussard(girlfriend)Behind the scenesAppears inWalkerActorJared PadaleckiColin Ford(Young Adult; Flashbacks)Seasons4FirstPilotLastSee You Sometime Cordell Walkeris the titular character in theThe CWcrime drama series,Walker. Cordell is a man finding his way back to his family while investigating crime in the state's most elite unit. Our broken widower and father of two returns home to Austin after being undercover for ten months for ahigh profile case- only to discover that there's even more work to be done at home.[2] Cordell Walker is the eldest son ofBonhamandAbeline Walker, and the older brother ofLiam Walker. He became friends withHoyt Rawlins, a boy from a troubled family. They attended high school together alongsideEmily, whom Cordell would go on to marry. After their marriage, they unexpectedly welcomed their first childStella. Cordell inadvertently chose their daughters name when he named Emily's red mustang. They ultimately lost the car in a poker game against Hoyt. Cordell is a whip-smart and intelligent man with a knack for humor. He has a tendency to ramble about mundane topics, while maintaining a sense of quietness about his personal life. He is sassy, witty, and has a fatuous sense of humor. Cordell has a strong sense of duty as he enlisted in the marine corps after 9/11 and continued this sense of duty by becoming aTexas Ranger. He is dedicated to his work which makes it difficult for him to separate his work life from his personal life. His deep love forEmilygrounded him and gave him a purpose beyond work or the military, even going as far as saying that her encouragement keeps him going. His love for his family is indisputable, though after Emily's death, Cordell struggled to find a reason for her death which left him obsessive. He was sent on a ten-month undercover assignment. Upon his return, Cordell leaned on alcohol to help him assimilate. His patience is tested repeatedly by his daughter,Stella, who struggles to forgive him for leaving. He longs for things to return to normal, even trying to force the normalcy, untilBonhamreminds him getting back to normal means starting fresh.

characters.name: Crystal West
characters.description: Crystal WestNameCrystal WestBirthdaySeptember 3, 1987Age32StatusDeadCause of DeathGun Shoot Wound/Car AccidentOccupationMember of theRodeo KingsGenderFemaleFamilyTrevor Strand(Son)Harriet (Sister)FriendsTwyla JeanDuke CulpepperJaxon DavisRomancesClint West(Husband)Behind the scenesAppears inWalkerActorRebekah GrafSeasons1FirstDukeCrystalis a recurring character onThe CW'sWalker. Crystal is a bright eyed, wild and charming woman, the type who married an unhinged criminal because he promised her an exciting life. She is reckless and lies with ease, but there is a humanity beneath her." Crystal married Clint West at an unknown point in her life, and they became a wild and dangerous couple. Although it's know that they were involved circa 2003/2004 as Crystal fell pregnant with Trevor. After he was born they left in the care of Crystal's sister Harriet who provided them updates on his milestones such as his first time walking as they couldn't leave the rush of criminal lifestyle behind. Their exciting life together included joining a traveling rodeo, which they used to cover their bank robberies. She was arrested on May 22, 2018, for disorderly conduct, extortion, and possession of an illegal substance. When she was released, Crystal reunited with Clint. They enlisted Jaxon Davis andTwyla Jeaninto their robbery crew, becoming known throughout Texas as theRodeo Kings. Their robberies often resulted in bank employees being critically injured and even killed. When Jaxon broke his leg, the crew was short a member and eventually initiated newcomerDuke Culpepperinto their crew.

characters.name: Dan Johnson
characters.description: Dan JohnsonGenderMaleBehind the scenesAppears inWalker, Texas RangerDan Johnsonis a super smart man in a wheelchair that was called in twice as a consultant byTexas RangersCordell WalkerandJames Trivette.
